format_discipline.notes: No frontmatter; H1 first non-empty line; reading.meta.json valid; six sections in correct order

no_forward_references.notes: Back-references to 13.1 and 12.10 only — both prior topics

beginner_readability.notes: LLM, register, SQL injection all defined on first use; no jargon dumps; plain register throughout

formatting.notes: Tables, bullets, numbered lists used appropriately; no walls of text; bold-term/plain-meaning definitions present

corpus_faithfulness.notes: All claims traceable to corpus sections 5.1–5.5, §6 worked example, §8 real-world patterns

verdict: PASS — reading meets all format, length, citation, readability, and faithfulness requirements.
